title: Pharmacy Technician
description: Mount Sinai is a leading health system with world-class clinical care, research, and education. You'll ensure accurate medication dispensing supporting patient-centered care.
responsibilities: Prepare and dispense medications following prescriptions
Verify medication inventory and manage pharmacy stock
Label medications and provide patient safety instructions
Maintain confidentiality of patient medication information
Support inventory management and ordering processes
Assist with continuing education and license maintenance

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; pharmacy technician certification required
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of pharmacy or healthcare experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
